2023-24 New Mexico Lobos Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 26-10 (10-8, 6th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Richard Pitino

PS/G: 81.0 (26th of 362)

PA/G: 70.7 (133rd of 362)

SRS: 15.04 (28th of 362)

SOS: 5.38 (86th of 362)

ORtg: 111.7 (60th of 362)

DRtg: 97.5 (30th of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +20000

NCAA Tournament: (#11 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (77-56) versus #6 Clemson

  • MWC Tourney Champ
